Godot MCP Pro — verify these files exist after copying addons/godot_mcp into your game project.

Critical runtime autoloads (startup errors if missing):
  mcp_screenshot_service.gd
  mcp_input_service.gd
  mcp_game_inspector_service.gd

Plugin core:
  plugin.cfg
  plugin.gd
  command_router.gd
  websocket_server.gd
  mcp_activity_log.gd

If any autoload file is missing, re-copy the entire folder from this repo's vendor/godot_mcp/ — do not copy only plugin.cfg or commands/.
